语言设置已保存，重启后生效: Language settings saved. Restart to apply.
选择界面语言（重启后生效）: Select interface language (takes effect after restart)
请设置 A、B 两个断点（点击行左侧，最多 2 个）: Please set A and B breakpoints (click left of line, max 2)
点击行左侧设置 A、B 断点（最多 2 个）: Click left of line to set A, B breakpoints (max 2)
行超宽时 Ctrl+Shift+F 自动换新篇章: Auto new section on Ctrl+Shift+F when line overflow
行超宽时 ⌘⇧F 自动换新篇章: Auto new section on ⌘⇧F when line overflow
数字 1 到 7 表示 do、re、mi、fa、sol、la、si 七个音。根据: Numbers 1-7 represent do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, si. Pitch is calculated from tonality.
0 表示休止符，不发音。后面可加 - 表示时值，如 0 - - - 为四拍休止。: 0 is a rest (no sound). Add - for duration, e.g. 0 - - - for 4-beat rest.
音符后的 - 表示增加一拍。1 为四分音符，1- 为二分音符（两拍），1- -: - after a note adds one beat. 1 is quarter, 1- is half (2 beats), 1- - is 3 beats.
音符后的 _ 将时值缩短一半。1 为四分，1_ 为八分，1__ 为十六分。: _ after a note halves duration. 1 is quarter, 1_ is eighth, 1__ is sixteenth.
音符后的 . 表示高八度。1. 为高音 do，1.. 为更高八度。: . after a note raises one octave. 1. is high do, 1.. is higher.
括号内多个音符同时演奏，形成和弦。如 (1 3 5) 为 do mi sol 大: Notes in parentheses play together as a chord. (1 3 5) is do mi sol major triad.
& 开始新声部，每行一个声部。用于多声部合奏或伴奏。: & starts a new part, one part per line. For multi-part or accompaniment.
| 为小节分隔符。根据拍号检查每小节时值是否正确。: | is bar separator. Beat value is checked against time signature.
括号后加数字 n 表示 n 连音。如 (1 2 3)3 将两拍均分为三个音。: Number n after ( ) means n-tuplet. (1 2 3)3 divides 2 beats into 3 notes.
~ 表示连音线，连接相邻同音高音符，使时值延续不重复触发。输入 ~ 时自动重复上: ~ is a tie connecting same-pitch notes. Typing ~ repeats the previous note.
# 升半音，b 降半音，^ 还原。作用于其后音符，如 #1 为升 do。: # sharp, b flat, ^ natural. Apply to following note, e.g. #1 is C#.
方括号内指定音色名称，如 [cello]、[guitar]。作用于其后的小节或记: Brackets specify instrument: [cello], [guitar]. Applies to following bars or scope.
记号作用域：方括号定义记号，圆括号内为作用范围。如 [8vb] 表示低八度。: Notation scope: brackets define notation, parens define range. [8vb] = octave down.
滑音：从起音滑到止音，默认 1 拍。可用 | 或 _ 改变时长。: Glissando from start to end note, default 1 beat. Use | or _ for duration.
重复上一个音，支持连音线。可用 - 和 _ 调整时值。: Repeat last note, supports ties. Use - and _ for duration.
颤音：主音与上方音快速交替。[tr+] 上颤音、[tr-] 下颤音。可用 - 和: Trill: rapid alternation. [tr+] upper, [tr-] lower. Use - and _ for duration.
电吉他失真度 0-100。[drive:N] 同义。仅对 guitar_elec: Electric guitar distortion 0-100. [drive:N] same. For guitar_electric, bass_electric only.
反复记号：[dc] 从头反复，[fine] 结束。常用于 D.C. al Fin: Repeat: [dc] from start, [fine] end. For D.C. al Fine.
双斜杠开始单行注释，该行内容不会被解析。: Double slash starts a comment line, content is ignored.
设置调性。0 表示 C 大调，数字为半音偏移。如 \\tonality{2} 为: Set tonality. 0 = C major, number = semitone offset. \tonality{2} = D major.
设置拍号。4/4 表示每小节四拍、四分音符为一拍。: Set time signature. 4/4 = 4 beats per bar, quarter note = 1 beat.
设置速度，单位 BPM（每分钟拍数）。120 表示每分钟 120 个四分音符。: Set tempo in BPM. 120 = 120 quarter notes per minute.
禁用小节时值检查。适合自由记谱，此时 beat 无效。: Disable bar duration check. For free notation, beat is ignored.
篇章间 TTS 语音。参数：文本、语言(zh/ja/en)、VOICEVOX 音: TTS between sections. Params: text, lang(zh/ja/en), VOICEVOX voice ID.
歌词：字/字 对应音符、声部、音色 ID、旋律。支持歌声合成。: Lyrics: syllable/syllable, part, voice ID, melody. Supports singing synthesis.
音符后括号内为行内歌词，一个字对应一个音。用于简谱下方歌词。: Parens after note = inline lyrics, one char per note. For lyrics under score.
导入其他 .choir 或 .txt 文件内容。路径相对于当前文件所在目录。: Import other .choir or .txt. Path relative to current file directory.
左侧点击音色即试听（TTS 模式为对话试听，歌唱模式用于歌词合成）: Click a voice on the left to preview (TTS mode: talk preview, Sing mode: for lyrics synthesis)
（未检测到歌唱角色，请安装 s0.vvm 等歌唱音声库）: (No singing voices detected. Install s0.vvm etc.)
歌唱模式：用于歌词合成，点击「清唱生成」试听: Sing mode: for lyrics synthesis. Click "Acappella" to preview.
请先选择音色（TTS 模式下选对话音色）: Please select a voice first (TTS mode: select talk voice)
请先选择音色（歌唱模式下选歌唱音色）: Please select a voice first (Sing mode: select singing voice)
{hint}中没有带 \\lyrics 的简谱。\n\n• 可在左侧工作区双击切:
No \lyrics in {hint}.

• Double-click another file in workspace (e.g. VOCALOID.choir)
• Or add \lyrics{syllable/syllable}{0}{voice_id}{0} to current file
请先在左侧音色列表中点击选择要使用的角色。: Please select a voice from the list on the left.
提示：当前设置为 Docker 模式，音色来自 voicevox_engine: Note: Docker mode. Voices from voicevox_engine. This panel is for local library mode.
✗ Open JTalk 辞書未安装（需运行「安装依赖」）: ✗ Open JTalk dict not installed (run "Install deps")
\n✓ 本地模式可用，无需 Docker: ✓ Local mode ready, no Docker needed
\n✗ 请完成上述安装后使用本地模式，或使用 Docker 版 voicevox: ✗ Complete installation above for local mode, or use Docker voicevox_engine
可选音声模型（选择后点击下载/删除，Ctrl+点击多选）: Voice models (select then download/delete, Ctrl+click for multi-select)
请先选择要下载的模型（Ctrl+点击可多选）: Select models to download (Ctrl+click for multi-select)
请先选择要删除的模型（仅可删除已下载的，Ctrl+点击可多选）: Select models to delete (downloaded only, Ctrl+click for multi-select)
所选模型未下载，无需删除: Selected models not downloaded, nothing to delete
Downloading and running voicevox_core install script...
✓ ONNX Runtime 与 Open JTalk 辞書安装完成: ✓ ONNX Runtime and Open JTalk dict installed
• 自动选择：本地库可用时优先使用，否则用 Docker\n• 本地库：需安装:
• Auto: use local if available, else Docker
• Local: install voicevox_core and models (Voice → Model Manager)
• Docker: run voicevox_engine (port 50021)
本地库（未就绪，请安装 voicevox_core 和音声模型）: Local (not ready, install voicevox_core and models)
请安装 voicevox_core 和音声模型（音色 → VOICEVOX 音声: Install voicevox_core and models (Voice → VOICEVOX Model Manager)
请输入单个 MIDI(21-108) 或音名(如 C4): Enter single MIDI (21-108) or note name (e.g. C4)
该乐器音域不包含 MIDI {midi}: Instrument range does not include MIDI {midi}
请先在左侧选择乐器: Please select an instrument on the left first
请先保存当前文件到工作区: Please save current file to workspace first
用 1音、2音、3音、4音 表示和弦中按音高从低到高的各音: 1st/2nd/3rd/4th note = chord notes from low to high
三音和弦模式（可添加多种，生成时轮流使用）：: 3-note chord patterns (add multiple, used in rotation):
四音和弦模式（可添加多种，生成时轮流使用）：: 4-note chord patterns (add multiple, used in rotation):
请至少添加一个三音或四音和弦模式: Add at least one 3-note or 4-note chord pattern
未在旋律中找到可伴奏的和弦（需 2–4 音的和弦，如 1/3/5 或 [V7]、: No accompaniment chords found in melody (need 2-4 note chords, e.g. 1/3/5 or [V7], [G7])
音频缓存用于加速重复播放，减少 VOICEVOX/TTS 调用。: Audio cache speeds up repeated playback and reduces VOICEVOX/TTS calls.
（超出后按最近使用时间逐出）: (evict by least recently used when exceeded)
